relationships.from: Process New Meeting Transcripts in FULL MODE
relationships.context: Scheduled task invokes meeting-detect command every 30 minutes
Scans Drive to find and download new transcripts
Queues discovered transcripts as JSON files in the inbox
Processes queued transcript requests from the inbox
Processing precedes approval in the meeting workflow pipeline
